author: Dark Cinematic Style
style_guide: Photorealistic, moody, low-key lighting, cinematic composition, dark atmosphere

scenes.title: Rainy Night Alley
scenes.description: A wet cobblestone alley at night, rain-slicked pavement reflecting a single neon sign, steam rising from a manhole cover, a lone figure in a trench coat walking away, deep shadows between buildings.

scenes.title: Abandoned Asylum Corridor
scenes.description: A long peeling-paint corridor in a derelict asylum, debris scattered on tile floor, a single chair at the far end lit by harsh light from a broken window, cobwebs, damp stains on walls.

scenes.title: Lighthouse in Storm
scenes.description: A solitary lighthouse on a rocky cliff battered by storm waves, beacon cutting through thick fog and rain, lightning illuminating churning dark water, spray and wind, dramatic sky.

scenes.title: Noir Detective Office
scenes.description: A dimly lit private detective office at night, venetian blind shadows across a cluttered desk, amber desk lamp casting harsh light, a revolver and whiskey bottle in frame, cigarette smoke curling through light beams.

scenes.title: Burial in the Fog
scenes.description: A funeral in a misty rural cemetery at dawn, black umbrellas clustered around an open grave, bare tree silhouettes emerging from thick ground fog, muted grey-green palette, distant church spire.

scenes.title: Abandoned Subway Station
scenes.description: A decaying underground subway station, flickering fluorescent lights, shattered tile walls, graffiti-covered columns, tracks disappearing into darkness, a single abandoned train car, water dripping from ceiling.

scenes.title: Forest Campfire at Dusk
scenes.description: A small campfire in a deep forest at twilight, flames casting warm light on surrounding tree trunks, smoke rising into the dark canopy, a tent silhouette in background, deep blue shadows beyond firelight.

scenes.title: The Catacombs
scenes.description: A narrow tunnel lined with stacked human skulls and bones, a single torch flickering on the wall casting dancing shadows, damp stone floor, arched brick ceiling disappearing into darkness.

scenes.title: Drowned Forest
scenes.description: Dead skeletal trees standing in still black water at twilight, mist hovering at water level, a small rowboat half-submerged, purple-grey sky with thin clouds, utter stillness, reflection barely visible.

scenes.title: Rooftop at Dawn
scenes.description: A lone figure standing at the edge of a high rooftop overlooking a sleeping city at first light, city lights still glowing below, thin layer of morning fog between buildings, muted blue-grey tones.
